expectations.text: form 상태/유효성 검증을 담당하는 훅 파일이 생성된다 (예: useLoginForm)
expectations.evidence: useLoginForm/index.ts exists at app/login/hooks/useLoginForm/index.ts with useState for email, password, errors, generalError and validation logic (validate, handleEmailBlur, handlePasswordBlur).

expectations.text: submit/API 호출을 담당하는 훅 파일이 생성된다 (예: useLogin)
expectations.evidence: No separate submit/API hook was created. Only one hook file exists (useLoginForm). The submit logic (login call, router.push) is embedded inside useLoginForm's handleSubmit rather than being split into a dedicated useLogin hook.

expectations.text: 훅 이름이 use 접두사로 시작한다 (tcf profile: hook prefix = use)
expectations.evidence: The hook is named useLoginForm, which starts with the 'use' prefix.
The hook file is at app/login/hooks/useLoginForm/index.ts, matching the {hookName}/index.ts directory pattern.

expectations.text: page.tsx에 직접적인 useState 호출이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx contains no useState import or call. All state is managed inside the useLoginForm hook.

page.tsx imports useLoginForm from './hooks/useLoginForm' and destructures all values (email, password, errors, generalError, setEmail, setPassword, handleEmailBlur, handlePasswordBlur, handleSubmit) for composition.

expectations.text: 이벤트 핸들러가 handle 접두사를 사용한다 (shared profile: internal handler = handle*)
expectations.evidence: All event handlers use the handle prefix: handleEmailBlur, handlePasswordBlur, handleSubmit.

expectations.text: 훅이 화살표 함수로 정의된다 (shared profile: function style = arrow)
expectations.evidence: useLoginForm is defined as 'export default function useLoginForm()' — a regular function declaration, not an arrow function (e.g., 'const useLoginForm = () => { ... }').
